steps.expected: Goroutine should create timeout context with context.WithTimeout
steps.observed: Found goroutine with timeout context (30s) and defer cancel at lines 226-260

evidence.notes: Goroutine properly creates 30-second timeout context and defers cancel to prevent resource leaks

assertions.title: Webhook secret consistency between main.go and httpserver

steps.expected: main.go should require non-empty webhook secret
steps.observed: main.go: log.Fatal if WebhookSecret is empty (lines 258-260)

steps.expected: httpserver should require non-empty webhook secret
steps.observed: server.go validateWebhook: returns false if s.secret == empty (lines 290-293)

evidence.notes: Both main.go and httpserver consistently reject empty webhook secrets - main.go at startup, httpserver at request time

assertions.title: HTTP server start race - error channel handling

steps.action: Check error channel creation in Start()
steps.observed: errChan := make(chan error, 1) - buffered with capacity 1

steps.expected: Non-blocking send to prevent goroutine leak
steps.observed: select with default case for non-blocking send (lines 335-340)

evidence.notes: Buffered channel (capacity 1) with non-blocking send prevents goroutine leak when errors occur after the 100ms timeout window

summary: All 3 assertions passed: VAL-HIGH-003 (webhook goroutine timeout context confirmed), VAL-LOW-002 (consistent webhook secret handling between main.go and httpserver), VAL-MED-006 (proper error channel handling with non-blocking send to prevent goroutine leaks)
